name: Five Layer Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (6 oz) Hershey's® Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chips
1 cup chopped dried apricots, or miniature marshmallows
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt butter in a baking pan measuring 3x9x2 inches.
3. Stir together the graham cracker crumbs, Hershey's® cocoa, and sugar until evenly distributed over the melted butter.
4. Pour the sweetened condensed milk evenly over the crumb mixture.
5. Sprinkle chocolate chips and chopped dried apricots or miniature marshmallows on top.
6. Sprinkle nuts on top.
7. Press down firmly to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
8. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until lightly browned.
9. Allow the bars to cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
10. Cover with foil and let stand at room temperature for 6 to 8 hours before serving. Approximately 36 bars will be produced.
